description: External RabbitMQ configuration inconsistencies in spring-cloud-dataflow chart across values, helpers, secrets, and configmaps

drift_points.expected: Support specifying secret key name for password (like external database config does)
drift_points.actual: Only supports secret name, not the key within the secret that holds the password
override_chain: templates/_helpers.tpl: helper reads secret but assumes fixed key name
templates/externalrabbitmq-secrets.yaml: generates secret without configurable key

drift_points.expected: Password should be optional when using external RabbitMQ with existing secret
drift_points.actual: Password is required even when existingSecret is provided
override_chain: templates/_helpers.tpl: helper checks password without considering existingSecret case

drift_points.expected: erlangCookie should be optional when using external RabbitMQ
drift_points.actual: erlangCookie is required even for external RabbitMQ where it is irrelevant
override_chain: templates/_helpers.tpl: helper validates erlangCookie regardless of rabbitmq mode
